deptName: ช่างอากาศยาน
standardRef: EASA part 147 The approved basic training course
learningOutcomes:
Be able to integrate knowledge into practical training and apply maintenance skills to
perform professional work with a habit of working carefully and safety.
objectives:
1. Be able to understand systematic processes of work and the organizational context
of organization.
2. Be able to perform professional work in the workplace until having technical
expertise skilled and experience in aircraft maintenance technician.
3. Have a good attitude to work neatly, be punctual, be patience with work, able to
work together with others, a habit of working carefully and safety.
4. Be able to apply knowledge and skills to professional careers at the technical level.
competencies:
1. Preparing the body and tool, equipment according to the job description.
2. Performing work follow procedures and processes assigned by organization.
3. Developing knowledge, skill to work practice in workplace.
4. Record and report document about the result of work practice.
description:
Continuously apprentice which according professional field in establisher by following
course approved by Civil Aviation Authority of Thailand (CAAT) until have technical expertise
skilled, maintenance experiences and competent at using tools and equipment and working
in accordance with maintenance manuals in technical level. through the mutual consent of
all relevant persons, record and report the performance all of practical training period.
